ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., walking, cycling, running) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the activity */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the activity */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "climb" INTEGER /* Climb (in meters) during the activity */,
  "average_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality of the activity (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_type FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type") REFERENCES activity_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "energy_expenditure" REAL /* Average energy expenditure (in kcal/h) for the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_friends" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  "friendship_date" TEXT /* Date the friendship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "friend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of group (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_members" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group that created the challenge */,
  "challenge_name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the challenge */,
  "challenge_type" TEXT /* Type of challenge (e.g., distance-based, time-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_participants" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the participant joined the challenge */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress of the participant in the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heart_rate_data" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the heart rate data */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate value */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the heart rate was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "date", "time_of_day")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_data" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sleep data */,
  "sleep_duration" INTEGER /* Sleep duration in hours */,
  "sleep_quality" INTEGER /* Sleep quality (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrition plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the nutrition plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nutrition plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the nutrition plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the nutrition plan */,
  "caloric_intake" INTEGER /* Recommended daily caloric intake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_plans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the workout plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workout plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the workout plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the workout plan */,
  "workout_frequency" INTEGER /* Recommended workout frequency (e.g., 3 times a week) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_plans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., challenge, workout, nutrition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user on the social media platform */,
  "connected_date" TEXT /* Date the social media account was connected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "platform")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_data" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of wearable device (e.g., Fitbit, Apple Watch) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data from the wearable device */,
  "sync_date" TEXT /* Date the data was synced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "device_type", "sync_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., distance, weight, body fat percentage) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_tracking" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress tracking */,
  "progress_value" REAL /* Value of the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id", "user_id", "progress_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., workout, nutrition, goal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recommendation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
